violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving unit in the walk-in cooler was found dirty. This should be cleaned and mainained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor found dirty throughout kitchen. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

General employee practices. — --Food employee observed eating while preparing food and outside of designated area. Food employee was observed eating in food prep area. Food should not be consumed in food prep areas.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving unit in the walk-in cooler was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Hot water was found at 129F at the hand sink. Hot water should not exceed 120F.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling vent above the oven was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
